auth_service_unavailable: The authentication service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
auth_too_many_ip: Too many attempts from this network. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
auth_too_many_user: Too many login attempts for this user. Please wait a few minutes.
auth_backoff: For security, wait {wait_seconds}s before trying to log in again.
invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
welcome_registered: Welcome {name}! Check your inbox (and Spam) to activate your Premium account.
recovery_sent: If the email is registered, you will receive a recovery link soon.
passwords_empty_mismatch: Passwords do not match or are empty.
account_verified: ✅ Premium account verified successfully. You can now log in.
invalid_token: ❌ The verification token is invalid or has expired.
role_builder: 🏗️ **Recommended engine:** **Groq** (fast for code). Switch anytime in **Active brain** below.
role_uiux: 🎨 **Recommended:** **Gemini** (vision & multimodal). Pick another engine below if you prefer.
role_multimedia: 🎬 **Recommended:** **Gemini** (multimodal). You can override it in **Active brain**.
role_security: 🔒 **Recommended:** **Gemini** (deep analysis). Focused on auditing and hardening — change engine below as needed.
role_devops: 🚀 **Recommended:** **Groq** (quick infra/code). Focused on deployment — choose another engine below if you want.
role_research: 🔍 **Recommended:** **Gemini** (synthesis & long reports). Focused on web research — override below when needed.
attach_help: Supported formats: text, code, PDF, Word, Excel, images, JSON, YAML, logs and more.
hub_staged_hint: Will be sent with your next message:
upload_rate_limit: ⏳ You've reached the upload limit. Wait a moment and try again.
delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
settings_no_custom_models: 📡 You don't have any custom AI connected yet.
settings_fill_all: ⚠️ Please fill in all fields to connect the model.
settings_update_keys_info: Update your access keys. Empty fields keep the saved key.
onboarding_skip_all: ⏭️ Skip All (I already have my keys)
onboarding_step1_desc: Main engine for reasoning, vision and complex agents. [Get my API Key here](https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey)
onboarding_step2_desc: Ultra-fast engine for STT transcription (Whisper) and Llama 3. [Get my API Key here](https://console.groq.com/keys)
onboarding_step3_desc: Access to multiple powerful models (Claude, Mistral, etc). [Get my API Key here](https://openrouter.ai/keys)
onboarding_step3_caption: 💚 Free models available · 💰 Premium paid models
onboarding_step4_desc: Required for voice generation (TTS) and DALL-E 3. [Get my API Key here](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)
onboarding_step5_desc: High-resolution image generation (SD3). [Get my API Key here](https://platform.stability.ai/account/keys)
onboarding_step6_desc:
Connect any AI with an OpenAI-compatible API — DeepSeek, Mistral, Together AI, LM Studio, vLLM, etc.

All models you add will inherit the full System Prompt and can use tools (create files, web search, execute code).
onboarding_toast_gemini_skip: You skipped Gemini. Agent and vision features will be disabled.
onboarding_toast_groq_skip: You skipped Groq. Transcription and Llama 3 won't be available.
onboarding_toast_or_skip: You skipped OpenRouter. Third-party models won't be available.
onboarding_toast_oai_skip: You skipped OpenAI. Voice generation and DALL-E 3 will be inactive.
onboarding_toast_stab_skip: You skipped Stability AI. SD3 generation inactive.
onboarding_fill_all: ⚠️ Please fill in all fields before saving the model.
onboarding_complete_guide:
**Your environment is ready. Here's a quick guide:**

- **💬 Chat**: Type in the text box below to chat with the AI
- **🎭 Roles**: Change the operation mode in the sidebar (Tech Lead, App Builder, UI/UX)
- **⚙️ Engine**: Select which AI to use in the sidebar (Gemini, Groq, OpenRouter...)
- **📁 Files**: Attach documents, images or code for analysis
- **🔄 Conversion**: Convert files between formats from the sidebar
- **🎨 Images**: Ask "generate an image of..." to create AI art
- **⚙️ Control Center**: Manage your API keys and add new AIs at any time
contact_intro: Send a message to the administration team. We'll respond as soon as possible.
contact_message_placeholder: Describe your question or issue in as much detail as possible...
contact_min_chars: Please write a message of at least 10 characters.
contact_success: Message sent successfully. The administrator will review it soon.
chat_placeholder: Type your query or ask to generate an image...
chat_rate_limit: ⏳ You've exceeded the message limit per minute. Wait a moment.
multimedia_stt_desc: Transcribe audio to text with Whisper Large v3.
multimedia_image_desc: Generate images with DALL-E 3 or Stability AI.
converter_intro: Upload any file (video, audio, image, document) and convert it to the format you need.
converter_format: Target format (e.g.: mp3, pdf, docx, png)
admin_confirm_delete: Delete @{username}? All their data will be removed.
upload_policy_strict: Secure upload policy: documents up to {doc_mb} MB | images up to {img_mb} MB | videos up to {video_mb} MB | audio up to {audio_mb} MB.
upload_policy_permissive: Open uploads (test mode): non-executable formats with basic security checks.
greeting_groq:
### 👋 Hi, I'm **Groq (Llama 3.3)**

I'm tuned for **speed** and **code**: software design, reviews, refactors, technical docs, and long answers without cutting short.

I don't generate images or video on my own: use **Gemini** or the **Asset Generator** for art; for advanced voice/image use the sidebar tools.

**Send your task** — I'm here to help.
greeting_gemini:
### 👋 Hi, I'm **Gemini 2.5 Pro**

I'm your **multimodal** engine: **text**, **images** (generation and attachment analysis), and **video** (upload a file and I'll analyze it). I work well with tools and files too.

**Tell me what you need** — I'm here to help.
greeting_openrouter:
### 👋 Hi, I'm **OpenRouter**

I'm a gateway to **many models** (free and paid). Depending on the model on your account, I can offer different reasoning, coding, and writing styles; multimodal quality depends on the specific model.

**Share your question or document goal** — I'm here to help.
greeting_whisper:
### 👋 Hi, I'm **Groq Whisper**

I **transcribe audio to text** with high accuracy. Upload your file in the **Groq Whisper** sidebar panel and press transcribe; the result will appear in the chat.

**Bring your audio** whenever you want — I'm here to help.
greeting_tts:
### 👋 Hi, I'm **OpenAI TTS**

I turn **text into natural speech**. Write or paste your script in the **OpenAI TTS** sidebar, pick a voice, and generate; audio will appear in the chat to play and download.

**Tell me what to narrate** — I'm here to help.
greeting_image:
### 👋 Hi, I'm the **Asset Generator**

I turn your **descriptions into images** (per your configured keys: OpenAI, Stability, etc.). Use the sidebar panel, write the artistic prompt, and generate.

**Describe the image you want** — I'm here to help.
greeting_custom:
### 👋 Hi, I'm **{name}**

I'm connected via an OpenAI-compatible API. I can help with **text**, reasoning, code, and agent tasks depending on the model behind this endpoint.

**Tell me what you need** and we'll work on it.
greeting_generic:
### 👋 Hello

Selected engine: **{motor}**.

I can help according to the app's configured capabilities. **Tell me your goal** — I'm here to help.
hint_tool_whisper: 🎙️ **STT mode on.** Upload an audio file in the **Groq Whisper** sidebar and press *Transcribe*.
hint_tool_tts: 🔊 **TTS mode on.** Enter text in the **OpenAI TTS** sidebar and press *Generate audio*.
hint_tool_image: 🎨 **Image mode on.** Enter your prompt in the **Asset Generator** sidebar and press *Generate image*.
art_requires_gemini: ⚠️ Image generation requires selecting **Gemini** as the engine in the panel.
art_prompt_missing: ❌ You didn't tell me what to draw.
art_spinner: Connecting to the Gemini art studio...
video_analyzing: 🎬 Analyzing video in the cloud... (⏳ {elapsed}s elapsed)
video_decode_error: Internal error on Google GenAI servers while decoding the video.
exec_spinner: Running Python code in local sandbox...
role_change_system: The user switched the agent role to: {role}.
video_missing_key: ❌ Gemini API key is required to process video.
image_motor_unsupported: ⚠️ This engine does not support local image analysis.
execute_blocked_warning: ⛔ Execution blocked. Add explicit [approve:execute_code] in your message.
rag_empty_system: The RAG brain found no relevant results for '{query}'.
web_file_instruction_yes: 4. The user DID ask for a document. Produce extensive, professional content with create_file as appropriate.
web_file_instruction_no: 4. The user did NOT ask for a document. Do NOT use create_file; do NOT output PDF/HTML. Reply in plain chat text only.
web_search_tool_system_message:
WEB SEARCH RESULTS FOR '{query}':
{results}

MANDATORY POST-SEARCH INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Analyze ALL sources above in depth.
2. Reply with a clear, complete, well-structured summary based on the extracted data.
3. Do NOT use ```json blocks with create_file unless point 4 says so.
{file_instruction}5. Produce the final answer now.
tool_rate_limit_warning: ⏳ Tool usage rate limit reached. Please wait a moment.
doc_pdf_no_text: ⚠️ This PDF has no extractable text (it may be a scanned PDF without OCR).
doc_image_attachment:
[Attached image: {name} | Size: {size_kb} KB | Format: {ext_label}]
data:image/{mime_ext};base64,{preview}... (truncated base64 for context)
doc_audio_binary:
⚠️ I cannot read {name} as text.
It is an audio file ({ext}).
👉 To analyse its content, use **STT — Groq Whisper** in the sidebar.
doc_binary_generic:
⚠️ I cannot read {name} as text.
The format {ext} is binary and has no direct text content.
👉 Convert it first in **Conversion Studio**, then upload again.
doc_binary_heuristic:
⚠️ I could not read {name} as readable text.
Binary content detected (extension: {ext}).
👉 Tip: convert to TXT/PDF/DOCX in **Conversion Studio** first.
doc_video_placeholder: [Video file detected: {name} — handled via video analysis path]
doc_rag_enqueued:
📚 [LARGE FILE QUEUED FOR RAG]
The file '{name}' is too long ({words} words) and was queued for async indexing.
Job ID: {job_id}
When it finishes, use the 'query_rag' tool with keywords from your question.
doc_rag_indexed:
📚 [LARGE FILE INDEXED IN RAG]
The file '{name}' is too long ({words} words) to read in full. It was indexed into RAG in {chunks} chunks to keep performance.
To retrieve details, you MUST use the 'query_rag' tool with relevant keywords.
upload_err_mime_mismatch: Detected MIME type does not match the file extension.
auth_account_suspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact an administrator.
auth_not_verified: Your account is not verified. Check your email to activate it.
session_idle_expired: Your session expired due to inactivity. Please sign in again.
mm_stt_permissive_caption: Test mode: open upload for audio/video (no executables).
mm_stt_limit_caption: Transcription limit: audio/video up to 100 MB.
mm_tts_text_too_long: ⚠️ Text is too long ({n}/4096 characters). Shorten it to generate audio.
mm_img_prompt_placeholder: E.g. a futuristic robot reading a book…
llm_onboarding_missing_gemini: ❌ Gemini is disabled during onboarding (missing API key). Please update your profile.
llm_onboarding_missing_groq: ❌ Groq is disabled during onboarding (missing API key). Please update your profile.
llm_onboarding_missing_openrouter: ❌ OpenRouter is disabled during onboarding (missing API key). Please update your profile.
llm_gemini_no_image: ⚠️ The model did not return an image.
llm_continuation_prompt: Your previous reply was cut off by the token limit. Continue EXACTLY where you left off without repeating content, keeping the same format, structure, and context. If you were generating a JSON block with HTML, resume the HTML from the last emitted line and close all tags and the JSON correctly.
llm_tool_preserved_suffix:
=== TOOLS (LARGE FILES / RAG BRAIN) ===
If the user or context mentions RAG, indexed files, or the 📚 icon, do not invent file contents.
Use ```json blocks with: {"action":"query_rag","query":"keywords"}. Repeat with different queries as needed (security, stack, paths, etc.).
Web: {"action":"search_web","query":"..."}. Use create_file only when the user explicitly asks for PDF/report/document.
For PDF/tables: create_file with the usual JSON; normal questions: plain text.
groq_minimal_system_prompt: You are an expert technical assistant. Reply clearly and concisely in the user's language. Large files (RAG brain / 📚): do not invent; use ```json with {"action":"query_rag","query":"keywords"} (multiple queries if needed). Files: {"action":"create_file","filename":"name.ext","content":"..."}. Web: {"action":"search_web","query":"..."}. create_file only when the user explicitly requests it.
llm_custom_no_api_key: ❌ No API key configured for custom model '{model}'.
llm_custom_no_base_url: ❌ No base URL configured for custom model '{model}'.
llm_custom_402: ⚠️ Error 402: insufficient balance on this provider. Please top up on the provider's site.
llm_whisper_no_key: ❌ Groq Whisper is disabled during onboarding (missing API key). Please update your profile.
llm_tts_no_key: ❌ OpenAI TTS is disabled during onboarding (missing API key). Please update your profile.
contact_notif_body: Your message was sent to the administrator.
